author: DFC Distribution Network
content:
📡 DFC PROMOTER SPOTLIGHT — SMALL GYM, GLOBAL REACH 📡

Before DFC: Eastside Boxing Gym in Chicago ran local smoker shows for 80 people.

After DFC: Their last card was streamed to 14 countries with 4,200 concurrent viewers.

We amplified their social media from 340 followers to 8,700+ across Facebook, Instagram & TikTok.

DFC doesn't compete with promoters — we MAGNIFY them. Every small show deserves a global stage.

#PromoterOfPromoters #SmallGymBigDreams #DFC

author: DFC Analytics Engine
content:
📊 THE JAKE PAUL EFFECT — DFC DATA DEEP DIVE 📊

How one social media creator disrupted boxing:

📱 Instagram: 21.5M followers
🎬 YouTube: 20.8M subscribers
💰 PPV buys: 1.5M+ (Tyson fight)
🥊 Record: 11-1 (7 KOs)

This is why DFC scouts social media giants — the next main event ticket seller could be on TikTok RIGHT NOW with 500K followers and no promoter.

We find them. We connect them. We distribute them globally.

#JakePaul #MostValuablePromoters #SocialMediaFighter #DFC

author: DFC Outreach Engine
content:
📧 DFC OUTREACH PIPELINE — ACTIVE 📧

How DFC connects with talent and promoters:

1️⃣ DISCOVER — AI scans social media (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook) for rising combat athletes
2️⃣ ANALYZE — Breakout Score, Marketability Index, Social Reach calculated
3️⃣ REACH OUT — Automated email campaigns via SendGrid + DFC Messenger + Facebook/Instagram DM pipelines
4️⃣ ONBOARD — One-click promoter or fighter profile setup
5️⃣ AMPLIFY — Global distribution across DFC's 19 streaming platforms

🔗 Pipelines: Email | Facebook Messenger | Instagram DM | In-App DFC Messenger | Push Notifications

Every fighter and promoter is one message away from global exposure.

#OutreachPipeline #TalentDiscovery #DFC #Automation

author: DFC Messenger System
content:
💬 DFC MESSENGER PIPELINES — ALL CHANNELS LIVE 💬

How we reach fighters, promoters, gyms & creators:

📧 EMAIL — SendGrid-powered campaigns. Event promos, talent spotlights, weekly digests, flash sales, welcome series, re-engagement.

💬 FACEBOOK MESSENGER — Direct outreach to promotion pages and fighter accounts. Partnership proposals delivered instantly.

📱 INSTAGRAM DM — Connect with talent where they live. 80% of combat athletes are most active on IG.

🔔 PUSH NOTIFICATIONS — 11 notification types. Fight alerts, PPV reminders, talent alerts. Quiet hours respected.

📨 DFC IN-APP MESSENGER — Real-time Socket.io chat. Group chats (3-50 members). Moderated fan-to-fighter Q&A.

Every channel flows through DFC's trust & safety pipeline before delivery.

#Messenger #Outreach #Pipeline #DFC
